'''Aemele''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
While on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] she managed to steal a [[Chu-Gon Dar cube]] from the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Ithes Olok]], as well as his notebook on how to operate it, by seducing him. She went to meet with her contact on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] where [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes]] were playing to give him the cube and receive her reward. Unfortunately for her, her contact had been captured by a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who sat in his place. Not wanting to give up on the chance of being paid, she met with this smuggler who proceeded to steal the cube from her to deliver to his own contact in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
